title: Wall Climbers
description: Gives spiders the basic ability to stick to walls and roofs by using legs and not the face!
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ccd88817fe3eef52a5c6bbf526df9844b3fb5a7.png)

Pack available on:

[![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44e61a09ca2a4cf429490271a31039fd6c1318e6.png)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/wall-climbers-spiders-climb-walls-right/)![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0f7b31dec36c12a26a3f7c53b3a8431296aba52.png)[![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6063c4dea4f85a6bf7cb1727ecdc66bf6d3095c.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/wall-climbers)

A simple resouce pack, but with a more than needed quality of life addition, having also a Fresh animation version.

Now spiders and cave spiders will be able to climb up walls and lay under blocks when they get stuck, making it seem more of an intentional behaveour than the result of stupid pathfindings.

![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JZo15pcb/images/cd47eff08982bfccd470cce4483fddf54c7cce1f.gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JZo15pcb/images/cd47eff08982bfccd470cce4483fddf54c7cce1f.gif)

There are 2 versions of this, one for both optifine and EMF, and one specifically for EMF, the last one being more precise because it uses the "is_climbing" instead of "is_on_ground" function to operate.

Speaking of which, because of the feedback given by the download count, the fresh wall climbers will only be for EMF, like look at this!

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/675794e3050c022420b92d3c1e3bbeabe8af5c77.png)

Just try it out, its really cool!

[![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60ec428eb3fea9e4297730b68cd44d90a2a2c433.png)](https://www.optifine.net/home)[![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f344affe45fd653ef8044d806a68711855411d06.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)[![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a2def72c7298f6aaeaee8ac34d0114def65ee1e.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)


Yes in the next few days most of my packs will be added to curseforge too because maybe someone of you prefer curseforge

ALSO YE THERE's FRESH ANIMATIONS WOOOOOOOOOOO
